title: Return of the Rangers
actors: Dave O'Brien, James Newill, Guy Wilkerson
plot: Texas Rangers Tex Wyatt "Dave O'Brien (I)'), Jim Steele (James Newill) and Panhandle Perkins Guy Wilkerson) are on their way to Custer and, as they ride through the hills, waiting for Jim to finish his song, they save the life of ...
